final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original illustration of a warm family reunion dinner scene (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a cozy, 烟火气 everyday-life aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered around a round Chinese dining table with family members gathered, glasses raised in a toast
Subject: must include a Chinese round table (圆桌), a steaming hot pot (火锅) as centerpiece, a full family group laughing and toasting together
Scene/backdrop: must include a wall covered with family photos in the background
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, intimate 幸福感 atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm-yellow dominant direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve the steaming hot pot as a prominent focal element; must convey 烟火气 and 幸福感 throughout the scene
Avoid:
